
# 2026-03-16 16:41:44.946667
+exit

# 2026-03-16 16:42:26.284273
+show modules

# 2026-03-16 16:42:36.125949
+use attack_chain

# 2026-03-16 16:42:38.451404
+clear

# 2026-03-16 16:42:40.571025
+set tat

# 2026-03-16 16:42:48.140457
+set target google.com

# 2026-03-16 16:42:50.994852
+runn

# 2026-03-16 16:42:52.634827
+run

# 2026-03-16 16:42:57.589330
+clear
